Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND toupper(trimws(gender)) %in% c("NS", "U")
normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND gender is NA/blank/unrecognised — retained as "Missing" in tables

description: Analysis population with valid birthweight (LBW sample)
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg
normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND NOT (is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg)

description: Analysis population with valid SGA classification
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg AND !is.na(gestation) & gestation >= 24 wks & gestation <= 42 wks AND !is.na(sga_category)

description: Discarded for SGA (Missing both BW and GA)
